title: phragmites communis proles humilis
intro: Phragmites communis proles humilis, also known as common reed or European reed, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the genus Phragmites. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Phragmites communis proles humilis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and its extracts have also been used in traditional medicine to create salves and poultices for topical application.
